zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pelham於大約1424年出生在英國素可勞頓時，他的父親Sir John Pelham Knt.38歲，母親Joan Courcy27歲。他於大約1450年與Alice Lewknor在英國素可結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1473年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Pelham于大约1424年出生在英国素可勞頓时，他的父亲Sir John Pelham Knt.38岁，母亲Joan Courcy27岁。他于大约1450年与Alice Lewknor在英国素可结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1473年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pelham was born about 1424, in Laughton, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Pelham Knt., was 38 and his mother, Joan Courcy, was 27. He married Alice Lewknor about 1450, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1473, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pelham est né environ 1424, à Laughton, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pelham Knt., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan Courcy, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lewknor environ 1450, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1473, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Pelham um 1424 in Laughton, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Pelham Knt. 38 und seine Mutter Joan Courcy 27. Er hat um 1450 in Sussex, England Alice Lewknor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1473 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Pelham è nato il circa 1424 nel Laughton, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Pelham Knt., aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan Courcy, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Alice Lewknor circa 1450, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1473, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Laughton, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスラウトン
ja.lifeSummary: John Pelhamが約1424年にイギリススセックスラウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Pelham Knt.は38歳，母Joan Courcyは27歳であった。約1450年にイギリススセックスでAlice Lewknorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1473年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pelham(이)가 대략 1424년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Pelham Knt.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Courcy(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 수세스에서 Alice Lewknor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1473년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pelham nasceu aproximadamente 1424, em Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pelham Knt., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan Courcy, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Lewknor aproximadamente 1450, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1473, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pelham родился около 1424 г. в местности лотон, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Pelham Knt. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Courcy, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lewknor около 1450 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1473 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pelham nació aproximadamente 1424, en Laughton, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pelham Knt., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan Courcy, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alice Lewknor aproximadamente 1450, en Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1473, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
